raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a laptop with a XXXX apr offer. I was making the minimum payments but Best Buy citi bank auto paid themselves for the full amount. I asked to have to reversed and they said they couldnt and to deal with my bank. My bank reimbursed me. Several days later Best Buy Citi Bank sent a refund. I called to let them know my bank sent it. I let my bank know too. The bank said they will take the duplicate payment back but they didnt. The next billing statement Beat Buy Citi Bank charged the account as a purchase for the reimbursement. No indication of what it was for along with interest ever since. Essentially they now charged twice for the same product but XXXX charge is accumulating interest. I did not authorize any additional charges. I am requesting to reverse the finance charges and send a separate bill for the reimbursement. They should not be allowed to charge the credit card and collect interest especially for their error. Each person I speak with on the phone is unhelpful.
